$description: Services vertical layer. Inherits saturday-core/Tokens.json in full — this file defines ONLY the electric-blue accent layer on top of it.

accent-services.$description: Electric Blue — the vertical's sole chromatic signal: 3D emissive pass, active nav, primary CTA, data-viz active-state lines

accent-services-wash.$description: Whisper-faint active-row/selected-state background wash — the only tinted background permitted on this vertical

accent-services-glow.$description: Box-shadow glow color for hover/focus states on primary buttons and the 3D centerpiece rim light

hub-wordmark.$description: Top-left corner chrome. Space Grotesk 700 uppercase, 12px, 0.15em tracking, --color-text-main, no background/border.

project-deck-panel.$description: Full-viewport chamfered panel (--chamfer-hero, 12px cut), --color-bg-base fill, 1px hairline border. Panel accent matches the linked vertical's own accent, not necessarily Electric Blue.

enter-link.$description: Elms Sans 13px uppercase weight 600, --accent-services color, 'ENTER →' text link, underline on hover only, no pill/fill/border.

com.saturdayservices.suite.note: This file defines ONLY the Services accent + component layer. Merge with saturday-core/Tokens.json for the full token set.
